risk: Risk Warning: Trading cryptocurrencies involves substantial risk and may result in the loss of your entire invested capital. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Only trade with capital you can afford to lose entirely.
backtest: Simulated Performance: All performance data presented on this website is derived from historical backtesting, not live trading. Simulated results have inherent limitations and do not guarantee future performance. Actual results may differ materially.
advice: No Financial Advice: The content and tools provided on this website are for informational and educational purposes only. We are not a licensed investment advisor, broker-dealer, or financial institution. Nothing on this website constitutes personalized investment advice.
testimonials: Testimonials: Individual user experiences may not reflect typical results. Testimonials are not guarantees of future performance or success.
payments: Payments: Subscription billing is processed by Whop Inc. as Merchant of Record. By subscribing, you also agree to Whop's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
third-party: Third-Party Services: Charts and market data are powered by TradingView. This website is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by TradingView, Inc.
closing.text: By using this website you confirm that you have read and accepted our {terms}, {risk}, and {privacy}.
